title: Lots o' Guns
description:
A ModPack focused on guns, moslty the TacZ Mod.
Beaware that this is an unofficial ModPack of TacZ.
body:
In this ModPack,\
you will explore the already friendly world of Minecraft with a slight twist.\
That being **GUNS**.

Make guns, ammo and atachments like\
scopes, extended mags, stocks, muzzles and even lasers!\
All made possible with the [TacZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) Mod, now in Fabric with the [TacZ: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-refabricated) Mod.

Here you can snipe, just shoot with\
rifles, SMGs, pistols and shotguns.\
You'll want to download this ModPack not just because of the guns,\
but also the stunning viwes you'll get with [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and theres also shader support.

Features:
1. Guns & Ammo
2. Atatchments
3. Great Terrain Generation
4. Amazing Views
5. Shader Support

A really cool map I've come across is this abandoned city by TryzMc: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/post-apocalypse-city

For any help or bug reports, join my discord using this link: https://discord.gg/C9b3anUaP9
